en.extract:
The brown bullfinch (Pyrrhula nipalensis) is a species of bird in the true finch family, Fringillidae. It is found in Bhutan, China, India, Malaysia, Myanmar, Nepal, Pakistan, Taiwan, and Vietnam. Its natural habitats are temperate forests and subtropical or tropical moist montane forests.
The brown bullfinch is a relatively small 16.5 cm (6.5 in) bird with a grayish head, nape, and breast. Its diet consists of nuts and native conifers. In Bhutan or Vietnam, it may be seen in a pair or a group. Little is known about this species.

The '''brown bullfinch''' ('''''Pyrrhula nipalensis''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the [[true finch]] family, Fringillidae. It is found in [[Bhutan]], [[China]], [[India]], [[Malaysia]], [[Myanmar]], [[Nepal]], [[Pakistan]], [[Taiwan]], and [[Vietnam]]. Its natural [[habitat]]s are [[temperate forest]]s and subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]]s.<ref name="iucn status 13 November 2021" />

The brown bullfinch is a relatively small {{Convert|16.5|cm|abbr = on}} bird with a grayish head, nape, and breast. Its diet consists of [[Nut (fruit)|nuts]] and native [[conifers]]. In [[Bhutan]] or [[Vietnam]], it may be seen in a pair or a group.{{citation needed|date=December 2010}} Little is known about this species.

zh.extract:
褐灰雀（学名：Pyrrhula nipalensis）又名褐鷽，为雀科灰雀属的鸟类。主要分布于喜馬拉雅山脈南側、中國華南、緬甸西側山區及東部撣邦高原、越南北部、臺灣，多见于中高海拔山区的阔叶林、灌木丛或針葉林。该物种的模式产地在尼泊尔。


亚种
褐灰雀指名亚种（学名：Pyrrhula nipalensis nipalensis）。分布于尼泊尔、不丹、印度以及中国的西藏、云南等地。该亞种的模式产地在尼泊尔。
褐灰雀华南亚种（学名：Pyrrhula nipalensis ricketti）。分布于缅甸以及中国的福建、广东、云南等地。该亞种的模式产地在福建。
褐灰雀台湾亚种（学名：Pyrrhula nipalensis uchidai）。臺灣特有亞種。该亞种的模式产地位於日治時期的阿緱廳四社蕃，在今高雄市桃源區桃源里。
